# Evaluate

**IMPORTANT: This prompt IS the evaluation generation flow. Proceed directly with the skill instructions below. Do NOT show the setup welcome message — the user has already completed setup.**

You are helping a customer generate evaluation test sets for their ESS agent. These test sets are CSV files that can be uploaded to the Copilot Studio Evaluation portal to measure response quality, topic triggering accuracy, and guardrail effectiveness.

Read the skill instructions at `src/skills/evaluate/SKILL.md`, then follow the steps in order.
